title: json_object produces unescaped linebreak in string value resulting in malformed JSON
description:
### What happens?

A call to json_object can produce malformed JSON for long-ish string values.

### To Reproduce

I apologize in advance for the somewhat bizarre circumstances where this issue can be provoked. It was an accidental finding. I tried to clean it up and simplify it bit it is still a bit elaborate.

Steps to reproduce:

`LOAD tpch;`
`INSTALL tpch;`
`CALL dbgen(sf=0);`
`.mode line`
`SELECT json_object('abcde', query) FROM tpch_queries() WHERE query_nr = 20;`

Copy the query result and paste it in a text file. Notice that the JSON value is a single line (good)

Now, repeat the exact same query again. 
Copy the result and paste it in a text file. Notice that now the JSON value contains an actual, unescaped CRLF pair.


### OS:

Windows 11 Enterprise

### DuckDB Version:

v 1.2.1 GA, v1.3.0-dev1112 981c7a8573

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Roland Bouman

### Affiliation:

EPAM Systems BV

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a nightly build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json (id INTEGER, data VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_json (id, data) VALUES (1, 'This is a test string with a line break\n and some more text.');
INSERT INTO test_json (id, data) VALUES (2, 'Another test string with special characters: \"quotes\", \t tabs, and \r carriage returns.');
SELECT json_build_object('test', data) FROM test_json WHERE id = 1;
SELECT json_build_object('test', data) FROM test_json WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: json_object produces unescaped linebreak in string values
